parsed_review.summary: CP00-215 is a descriptor-only RP06 DMS Core pack (risk C, 150 units, RP06.P04.M06.S03-RP06.P05.M02.S14) closing the P04 UI cycle tail and opening the P05 fixture-case foundation. Read-only inspection of registry.js, service.js, validators.js, the contract, and model.test.js confirms the pack's claims are internally consistent and supported: pack binding, deliverable/phase/micro-title distributions match the baseline exactly and are drift-enforced by validators.js; no-write/no-real-data/descriptor-only boundaries are enforced in code AND asserted in tests (synthetic-only fixtures, runtime_execution=false, dispatches_ai_runtime=false, cross_tenant_access_allowed=false, real_client_data_loaded=false). The dms package has no fs-write/network/child_process/env/eval/secret surface; the validate script is read-only. Claude is constrained to read-only Read/Grep/Glob and is not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false throughout); Hermes is used only for deterministic descriptor review packet/receipt handling (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false). CP178+ review hardening (forbidden_review_evidence + hardened_review_sequence) is present and the readiness auth-preflight passed with non-zero valid-JSON stdout. The pack correctly claims production_ready=false / implemented_pending_review and does NOT claim production readiness or enterprise trust from local validation, so no production_ready gate is weakened. No P0/P1/P2 findings. Two P3 scope notes: (1) producer-reported command results in command-evidence.json were not re-executed in this read-only review and were verified only by source/contract/test/validator inspection; (2) post-review pack artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, consistent with the pending pre-review state and must be produced/validated before commit. Final approval and enterprise-trust closure remain a human gate outside this review.

findings.title: Producer-reported validation command results not independently re-executed in read-only review
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for npm test, npm run build, npm run validate, npm run rp06:dms-core:validate, git diff --check, and the other plan/spec/control-plane validators. As a read-only reviewer (Read/Grep/Glob, no Bash) I verified the underlying source, contract, test, and validator consistency by inspection (e.g. validators.js:3870-3890 enforces CP215 distribution/drift; model.test.js:1737-1791 asserts the descriptor-only and authority-boundary invariants; contract current_pack=CP00-215 with writes_product_state=false), but I did not re-run the commands themselves. This bounds what this review attests to: code-level consistency, not live command re-execution.
findings.recommendation: Keep the post-review gated validation commands (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) as the authoritative pre-commit gate, and rely on the deterministic Hermes receipt + human final approval for the runtime/enterprise-trust claim rather than this read-only review.
findings.post_review_disposition: Accept as scope limitation; not blocking. Final closeout remains gated on post-review validation commands and human approval.

findings.title: Post-review pack artifacts not yet present (expected pending pre-review state)
findings.details: manifest.json evidence_refs/required_pack_artifacts list claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, but only manifest.json and command-evidence.json currently exist in docs/closeout-packs/cp00-215/. This is consistent with pack_level_claude_review.status='pending' and valid_review_receipts=[]: these artifacts are produced after this read-only review by the later hardened-sequence steps (normalize, receipt_validate, adjudication, construction_inspection). It is the correct pre-review state, not a defect, but is recorded so the requirement is tracked.
findings.recommendation: Before commit/closeout, ensure claude-review-result.json (normalized from this review), adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are generated and pass receipt/closeout-pack validation per the hardened_review_sequence; do not mark the pack closed until they exist and validate.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected sequencing; not blocking. Must be produced and validated before commit per the hardened review sequence.
